collections.title: Arcane Masters
collections.subtitle: Court painters of the Indian subcontinent, 17th–19th century
collections.description: A scholarly survey of master painters whose names rarely surface in Western collections.  This selection draws from the gallery's ongoing Arcane Masters research catalogue.
